ops.body: W3 shipped as a02e4858 (CI green, 770 pytest + 47 node): bridge quotes emit per-connection airports (both fli and SerpApi leg shapes verified; fli's OKA/NAH alias rewritten back via the shared request-side helper — review-caught major, the veto and visa research would have silently targeted Tahuna, Indonesia); validator requires connections with len == stops; composed cash legs carry them; avoid_transit now vetoes cash-hop connections; transit collector checks each airport individually. Implements task 0436605's criterion end-to-end (closing at W7 after the live capstone). REJECTED review finding (for W6 record): stale-bridge.json bare KeyError — fail-loud is house style, W4's stderr_tail makes it self-diagnosing in walker runs, a read-site catch is forbidden scar tissue. Implementer premise note: the "interim stops>=1 possible flag" never existed as a literal artifact — the old prompt was merely silent on cash connections; outcome implemented as intended. W5 in flight (collapse-branch → invariant assert + fable finder/refuter over the historical band/Pareto math).
